g.text: M1 | zcmb-m1 | Shared Memory Ring Buffer | SPSC lock-free queue in POSIX shm
M2 | zcmb-m2 | Zero-Copy Serialization | FlatBuffer-style direct memory access
M3 | zcmb-m3 | Multi-Producer Multi-Consumer | Vyukov MPMC + sharded alternative
M4 | zcmb-m4 | Publish-Subscribe Topics | Trie routing + zero-copy fan-out
M5 | zcmb-m5 | Crash Recovery Durability | WAL, checkpoint, orphan reclamation

div.p: seq == pos: EMPTY, ready for producer seq == pos + 1: HAS_DATA, ready for consumer seq == pos + capacity: RECYCLED, next cycle
